data.title: Bluesky Planning Payment Platform That Could Arrive In 12 Months, Says COO Rose Wang, Aims To Align Financial Incentives With Users
data.description: Bluesky plans to launch its own payment platform within 12 months and introduce subscription features early next year to enhance user monetization and self-expression.

data.title: Self-Proclaimed Bitcoin Inventor Craig Wright Awarded Prison Sentence For Defying Court Order
data.description: Australian computer scientist Craig Wright, who has consistently claimed to be Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) creator Satoshi Nakamoto, was held in contempt of court on Thursday and handed out a one-year suspended prison sentence for continuing to sue developers.

data.title: China Keeps Benchmark Lending Rates Steady As Fed Signals Fewer Cuts Ahead
data.description: China kept its benchmark lending rates unchanged on Friday, with the one-year loan prime rate held at 3.1% and the five-year LPR at 3.6%.

data.title: Nike, Fedex, Blackberry, Rigetti, And Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: Major U.S. indices closed Thursday with mixed results. The Dow Jones Industrial Average edged up by 0.04% for the day.

data.title: Tom Lee Explains Why 'Fewer Cuts In 2025' Could Boost The Market, Urges Investors To 'Buy The Dip' Amid Recent Volatility
data.description: U.S. stock markets could benefit from fewer interest rate cuts in 2025 despite recent volatility, according to Fundstrat's head of research Tom Lee, who sees the Federal Reserve's hawkish stance as potentially beneficial for investors.
